phonetic: ﾋ庫騨臣ﾉｪﾋ埿rerﾉ冤i; ﾋ伊騨臣ﾉｪtrﾉ冤i
meaning: adv.豁ｦ譁ｭ蝨ｰ,莉ｻ諢丞慍,荳捺ｨｪ蝨ｰ
examples: Citizenship and Immigration Services will charge the applicants arbitrarily.
While sending flowers as gifts, we can't choose flowers arbitrarily, because different flowers may carry different meanings.
The leaders of the groups were chosen arbitrarily.
But the judge also ruled that she could not arbitrarily refuse to certify later-amended returns (based on recounts).
Yet the new tax bill arbitrarily sets that level as the threshold for wealth.
